settings.title: Plans Directory
settings.description: Customize where plan files are stored. Path is relative to project root (default: ~/.claude/plans)

settings.title: Respect Gitignore
settings.description: Control whether the @ file picker respects .gitignore patterns. When true (default), files matching .gitignore patterns are excluded from suggestions

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE DEBUG LOG LEVEL
settings.description: Debug log verbosity level

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE DISABLE NONESSENTIAL TRAFFIC
settings.description: Disable auto-update checks, telemetry, and feedback in one setting

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE ENABLE FEEDBACK SURVEY FOR OTEL
settings.description: Enable feedback survey collection via OpenTelemetry for enterprises

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE OTEL FLUSH TIMEOUT MS
settings.description: OpenTelemetry span flush timeout in milliseconds (default: 5000)

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE OTEL HEADERS HELPER DEBOUNCE MS
settings.description: OpenTelemetry header helper refresh interval in milliseconds

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE OTEL SHUTDOWN TIMEOUT MS
settings.description: OpenTelemetry shutdown timeout in milliseconds (default: 2000)

settings.title: OTEL LOG ASSISTANT RESPONSES
settings.description: UNDOCUMENTED. Include assistant response text in the claude_code.assistant_response OpenTelemetry log event (added v2.1.193). When unset, follows OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS; set to 0 to keep prompts-only.

settings.title: Allow All Claude Ai Mcps
settings.description: (Managed settings only) Load claude.ai connectors alongside a deployed managed-mcp.json, which otherwise takes exclusive control and suppresses them. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/managed-mcp

settings.title: Allow Mach Lookup
settings.description: macOS only. Additional XPC/Mach service names the sandbox may look up. Supports a single trailing * for prefix matching. Needed for tools that communicate via XPC such as the iOS Simulator or Playwright. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/sandboxing#network-isolation

settings.title: Allow Managed Hooks Only
settings.description: (Managed settings only) Prevent loading of user, project, and plugin hooks. Only allows managed hooks and SDK hooks. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#hook-configuration

settings.title: Allow Managed Mcp Servers Only
settings.description: (Managed settings only) When true, only allowedMcpServers from managed settings are respected; MCP servers defined in user, project, or local settings are ignored. deniedMcpServers still merges from all sources. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/managed-mcp

settings.title: CLAUDE AGENT SDK MCP NO PREFIX
settings.description: Skip 'mcp__<server>__' prefix on MCP tool names in Agent SDK

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE ACCESSIBILITY
settings.description: Keep native cursor visible for screen magnifiers and assistive tools

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE DISABLE ADVISOR TOOL
settings.description: Disable the server-side advisor tool. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/env-vars

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE DISABLE ARTIFACT
settings.description: Disable the Artifact tool. Equivalent to setting disableArtifact. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/env-vars

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE DISABLE BUNDLED SKILLS
settings.description: Disable the skills and workflows bundled with Claude Code (plugins and project .claude/skills are unaffected). See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/env-vars

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE DISABLE OFFICIAL MARKETPLACE AUTOINSTALL
settings.description: Skip automatic installation of official marketplace plugins

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE ENABLE BACKGROUND PLUGIN REFRESH
settings.description: Refresh plugins at turn boundaries

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE ENABLE FINE GRAINED TOOL STREAMING
settings.description: Force fine-grained tool output streaming

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE ENABLE TELEMETRY
settings.description: Set to 1 to enable telemetry collection. Required for all OpenTelemetry integration. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/monitoring-usage#common-configuration-variables

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE GLOB TIMEOUT SECONDS
settings.description: Glob tool timeout in seconds (default: 20-60)

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE IDE SKIP AUTO INSTALL
settings.description: Skip automatic IDE extension installation

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE MAX TOOL USE CONCURRENCY
settings.description: Maximum parallel tool executions (default: 10)

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE MCP TOOL IDLE TIMEOUT
settings.description: Idle timeout in milliseconds for remote MCP tool calls (default: 300000, about 5 minutes). When an HTTP, SSE, WebSocket, or claude.ai connector MCP server sends no response and no progress notification for this long, the tool call aborts with an error instead of waiting for the overall MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT. Set to 0 to disable the idle check. Values below 1000 are raised to one second, and the value is capped at the effective MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT. Does not apply to stdio or IDE servers. Requires Claude Code v2.1.187 or later. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE PLUGIN CACHE DIR
settings.description: Root directory for plugin cache

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE PLUGIN GIT TIMEOUT MS
settings.description: Plugin marketplace git operations timeout in milliseconds (default: 120000). See https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#2151

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE PLUGIN KEEP MARKETPLACE ON FAILURE
settings.description: Keep plugin cache on update failure

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE PLUGIN PREFER HTTPS
settings.description: Set to 1 to clone GitHub owner/repo plugin sources over HTTPS instead of SSH. Useful in CI runners, containers, or environments without a configured SSH key for github.com. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/env-vars

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE PLUGIN SEED DIR
settings.description: Path(s) to pre-populated plugin directories

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE SESSION ID
settings.description: Set automatically to the current session ID in Bash/PowerShell tool subprocesses, hook command subprocesses, and stdio MCP server subprocesses. Read-only. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/env-vars

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE SIMPLE
settings.description: Minimal mode with core tools only

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE SYNC PLUGIN INSTALL
settings.description: Wait synchronously for plugin installation

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE SYNC PLUGIN INSTALL TIMEOUT MS
settings.description: Timeout in milliseconds for synchronous plugin installation

settings.title: CLAUDE CODE USE POWERSHELL TOOL
settings.description: Enable PowerShell as default shell for interactive commands (Windows)

settings.title: CLAUDECODE
settings.description: Set to 1 in subprocesses Claude Code spawns (Bash and PowerShell tools, tmux sessions, hook commands, status line commands, stdio MCP server subprocesses). IDE extensions also set this in their integrated terminals. To distinguish a direct tool/hook subprocess from a stdio MCP server subprocess, use CLAUDE_CODE_CHILD_SESSION instead. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/env-vars

settings.title: Default Shell
settings.description: Default shell for input-box ! commands. Default: bash. Using "powershell" routes ! commands through PowerShell on Windows and requires CLAUDE_CODE_USE_POWERSHELL_TOOL=1 with pwsh on PATH. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#available-settings

settings.title: Disable Artifact
settings.description: Disable the Artifact tool, which publishes session output as a private web page on claude.ai. Also configurable via the CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ARTIFACT environment variable. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#available-settings

settings.title: Disable Claude Ai Connectors
settings.description: Disable claude.ai MCP connectors so they are not auto-fetched or connected. A value of true in any settings source takes precedence. Requires Claude Code v2.1.182 or later. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#available-settings

settings.title: Disabled Mcpjson Servers
settings.description: List of rejected MCP servers from .mcp.json. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp

settings.title: DO NOT TRACK

settings.title: Elicitation

settings.title: Elicitation Result

settings.title: MCP CONNECTION NONBLOCKING

settings.title: MCP REMOTE SERVER CONNECTION BATCH SIZE

settings.title: MCP TIMEOUT

settings.title: MCP TOOL TIMEOUT
settings.description: Timeout in milliseconds for MCP tool execution (default: 100000000, about 28 hours). A per-server timeout field in .mcp.json overrides this for that server. Values below 1000 are floored to one second. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp

settings.title: OTEL LOG TOOL CONTENT
